remember: Students will be able to recall the types of debentures, features of debentures, and their advantages and disadvantages.
Students will be able to remember the steps involved in the issue and redemption of debentures.
Students will be able to recall the journal entries related to the issue and redemption of debentures.
understand: Students will be able to understand the concept of debenture issue and redemption, and its impact on the company's financial position.
Students will be able to understand the different methods of debenture issue and redemption, and their implications.
Students will be able to understand the role of debentures in the company's capital structure and their relation with shareholders.
apply: Students will be able to apply the knowledge of debenture issue and redemption to real-life scenarios.
Students will be able to apply the journal entries and accounting treatment for debenture issue and redemption to a given situation.
Students will be able to apply the concept of debenture issue and redemption to analyze the financial position of a company.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the advantages and disadvantages of debenture issue and redemption.
Students will be able to analyze the impact of debenture issue and redemption on the company's financial ratios and position.
Students will be able to analyze the different methods of debenture issue and redemption and recommend the most suitable one.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of debentures and their types.
To learn the features of debentures and their advantages and disadvantages.
To study the methods of debenture issue and redemption, and their implications.
board_exam_objectives: To issue debentures at a premium (face value and market value) and record the necessary journal entries.
To redeem debentures at a premium (face value and market value) and record the necessary journal entries.
To calculate the amount of debenture interest and record the necessary journal entries.
